meta.title: The Kids Who Hacked Xbox
meta.description:
Support our channel and check out https://fern.deals/odoo94 to create your website for free! (ad)


A group of teenagers hacked the world’s biggest game developers over the course of several years. This is their story.

Wired article: https://www.wired.com/story/xbox-underground-videogame-hackers/
Darknet Diaries episodes: 
https://darknetdiaries.com/episode/45/ 
https://darknetdiaries.com/episode/46/ 

Original: https://youtu.be/kNnqMq9zA84
